## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`go fmt ./...`)
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under the project license.
- [ ] I did not copy code/assets from incompatible or unknown-license sources.
- [ ] I have signed off all commits (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/)

## DCO Sign-Off

All commits must include a `Signed-off-by` line (use `git commit -s`). This certifies that you wrote or have the right to submit the code under the project's AGPL-3.0 license. See the [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/) for details.
